creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Tue Jan 22 06:21:18 2013
New Revision: 310804
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310804

Log:
  - update to 0.8.4
  - while here fix formatting of pkg-descr, and trim historical header
  
  PR:		175493
  Submitted by:	maintainer, christer.edwards@gmail.com

Modified:
  head/sysutils/salt-cloud/Makefile
  head/sysutils/salt-cloud/distinfo
  head/sysutils/salt-cloud/pkg-descr
  head/sysutils/salt-cloud/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/salt-cloud/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/salt-cloud/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 06:00:37 2013	(r310803)
+++ head/sysutils/salt-cloud/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 06:21:18 2013	(r310804)
@@ -1,14 +1,10 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for: salt-cloud
-# Date created:	2012-07-16
-# Whom:		Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com>
-#
+# Created by: Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	salt-cloud
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.4
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
-MASTER_SITES=	https://github.com/downloads/saltstack/salt-cloud/
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 
 MAINTAINER=	christer.edwards@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Provisioning salted minions to various cloud providers

Modified: head/sysutils/salt-cloud/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/salt-cloud/distinfo	Tue Jan 22 06:00:37 2013	(r310803)
+++ head/sysutils/salt-cloud/distinfo	Tue Jan 22 06:21:18 2013	(r310804)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (salt-cloud-0.8.1.tar.gz) = 41017
+SHA256 (salt-cloud-0.8.4.tar.gz) = 376c0cbb0667a54c5ef1a5913bef6a61d72f7dbbe5bf24cabcd4894b66eeaf6a
+SIZE (salt-cloud-0.8.4.tar.gz) = 70189

Modified: head/sysutils/salt-cloud/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/salt-cloud/pkg-descr	Tue Jan 22 06:00:37 2013	(r310803)
+++ head/sysutils/salt-cloud/pkg-descr	Tue Jan 22 06:21:18 2013	(r310804)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Salt Cloud is a generic cloud provisioning tool which can hook into 
 existing cloud management systems. 
 
-WWW:	http://saltstack.org
+WWW: http://saltstack.org
